history.Chinese:
用法：history [条数] | history clear
功能：查看或清理命令历史
示例：
  history - 查看最近10条命令
  history 20 - 查看最近20条命令
  history clear - 清空所有命令历史
适配系统：Windows/Linux/Termux全兼容
history.English:
Usage: history [count] | history clear
Function: View or clear command history
Examples:
  history - View last 10 commands
  history 20 - View last 20 commands
  history clear - Clear all command history
Compatible systems: Windows/Linux/Termux
